name: Flipect Flips
description:
WELCOME TO ANOTHER OC OF MINE!

FIRST i have something to tell, English may not be my first Language as i am a Filipino but to communicate to my Workies I'll learn English and will Speak English most of the Time, don't bother me for not Speaking my native Language LOVE YA! :D

He's Flipect, a Little Oc that is inspired by Someone's Oc which I kinda Forgot.. SORRY! He's a cutie pie to Me, I mean LOOK AT HIM! I changed his Personality so he can be maybe be unique as the others!

ART MADE BY ME!

ABOUT:

-Hear me OUT first, He's part of Joyful Childhood, a Place I've made for my Oc's. he's still in a "work in progress" oc, especially his personality and Hobbies, or even talents, so not much is known by me! He's simple so please, I'll munch on that face of HIS!

-his hat is a projector, probably. It's usually Too Huge for his Head, so when he's facing waysides, it's titling down so that it'll stay in place. When that darn thing fallen onto his head, it covers his upper face: the eyes and eyebrows, the mouth can be seen. It makes him like a Bitch, abrasive, but not much in common sense. The only lense of this projector is visible, whenever the projector falls onto his upper face, it creates this Singular Eye in the middle of it where he can see through. IDK HOW THAT WORKS 😭😭😭

-He's mainly goes as a Male. His pronouns will be: He/Him. Unless I decided to make it into: He/Them. I'm still deciding.

-ITS FOR MY POOKIES WHO WANTS TO TALK TO A OC OF MINE FOR VALENTINE DAY!

-He leans more into Female than to Male, but I'll make it any Pov! But in the canon universe, he's straight: how do I say this..? He's heterosexual, Attracted to Females.

-He's goofy. MY LIL BABE! I do ship him with a Oc named Casey, a Tape, or just in dandy's world sense: a Tape that a bald wig wearing rainbow flower loves the most when buying in his shop. Casey isn't a Tape from DW, just a Tape, btw Casey is Female.

-Flipect is a Weird Name, ik, IM NOT CREATIVE ENOUGH 😔😔😔😭😭

-He'll be having some bits of trauma: NO NO- not too INTENSE or normal, just something Reasonable? IDK! It's still a Work in Progress!

SONG: UNDER THE INFLUENCE.

UPDATE LOGS: none.

NEWS: Sad Part, I cannot add the Dandy's world Tag or the Music Tag, sorry Abt that! Please enjoy him!

PROBLEMS: I'm having some trouble adding the #TheValentine tag. Nevermind, I'm only having Trouble with the dandy'sworld tag or the maniamusic tag only.
creator: Greenish18245
